title: xanthophyllum havilandii
intro: Xanthophyllum havilandii is a plant species belonging to the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the xanthophyllum. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids in its extracts. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum havilandii include its potential to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, while also exhibiting antioxidant and cytotoxic activities. The herbal preparations of Xanthophyllum havilandii typically involve the use of its leaves and stems, which are used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
